stemHtml: A pilot departs an aerodrome on the West coast of Spain at dawn for a flight to New York. Half an hour after departure, the VHF station for communication can no longer be received. What are two of the main reasons that VHF radio range is limited to line of sight?

options.a: Fading by reflected signals, and limited transmission power.
options.b: Inversion of polarisation by the ionosphere, and attenuation.
options.c: Absorption by the ionosphere, and no direct waves.
